name: Kallisto C++ Dev Environment
postStartCommand: nohup bash -c 'SERVER_DIR="$HOME/.antigravity-server/bin"; mkdir -p "$SERVER_DIR"; while true; do for dir in "$SERVER_DIR"/*-*; do if [ -d "$dir" ]; then dirname=$(basename "$dir"); commit="${dirname#*-}"; symlink="$SERVER_DIR/$commit"; if [ ! -e "$symlink" ]; then ln -s "$dir" "$symlink" 2>/dev/null; fi; fi; done; sleep 5; done' > /dev/null 2>&1 &
